formula_plain_text: When the actual gap between conductors differs from the tabulated default for the equipment type, the incident-energy result must be adjusted. The 2018 method provides correction formulas per electrode config and voltage class.

symbols.meaning: Default gap from Annex C Table A.1

applicable_range.note: Beyond ±4× the tabulated gap, IEEE 1584:2018 declares the model out of range.

values_per_voltage_class_per_config._note: IEEE 1584:2018 §10.3 specifies per-class per-config gap-adjustment formulas. Coefficient values pending transcription from Table 8 (or equivalent in published references).

worked_examples.source: IEEE 1584:2018 §10.3 worked example (approximate; verify when coefficients transcribed)
